reviews.text:
If you have been a victim of her misconduct, you should file a complaint with the Office of the Committee on Professional Conduct. It is crucial to prepare your complaint carefully and correctly to prevent it from being dismissed during the initial screening.

**IMPORTANT:** The Office of Professional Conduct dismisses 99% of complaints without fully reviewing them. Often, they claim the complaint falls outside their jurisdiction or lacks sufficient evidence. To avoid this outcome, include a **cover letter** that clearly addresses the following two points at the top:

### 1. **Jurisdiction and Scope**

Affirm that your complaint falls within the jurisdiction of the Office. Clearly cite the specific Arkansas Rule(s) of Professional Conduct you believe were violated. For example, you may reference **Article 15 – Duty of Candor**. Be explicit in stating that your complaint pertains to matters under the Office’s authority and cannot be dismissed on jurisdictional grounds.

### 2. **Supporting Evidence**

Confirm that you have sufficient evidence to support your claims. Provide a brief list of the materials you are submitting, such as:

* Emails
* Letters
* Transcripts
* Audio/video recordings
* Sworn or notarized statements
* Witness affidavits

Be sure to organize all evidence clearly. State that you are submitting *sufficient supporting evidence*, including notarized documents and signed witness statements where applicable.

### Additional Tips:

* Reference specific rules and laws precisely.
* Highlight recurring violations such as:

* Suppression of evidence
* Bias or favoritism toward one party
* Providing incorrect legal advice
* Making promises she does not keep
* Violating **Article 15 – Duty of Candor**

Research and cite all applicable rule violations accurately.

---

**Do not remain silent.**
If you have been harmed, take action to protect your rights and hold misconduct accountable.

With my intense workload, handling this on my own would have been extremely difficult, and I’m confident I would not have achieved the same outcome without their help.

Their experience handling accident cases truly shows. They made sure I was properly compensated not only for the accident itself, but also for the pain and suffering that came with it. The insurance company initially offered a settlement that was very low, but Lacy Law was diligent, persistent, and held them accountable. Because of their efforts, they were able to negotiate a settlement that truly made me whole.

I’m incredibly grateful for their professionalism, communication, and dedication throughout the entire process. I would highly recommend Lacy Law Firm to anyone needing legal representation after an accident.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much John for the wonderful review. It was a pleasure to represent you. We wish you the best in the future and a Happy New Year.

I filed for disability after a terrible car wreck with a crushed ankle & bad head trauma. After several years, my ankle caused knee and hip problems. Then I started getting migraines. Later I slipped on the ice and had a bulging disc in my lower spine.
After I was denied I called Rainwater Holt and Sexton. Ashley Loy was my lawyer and Tina Bever her assistant, & I absolutely loved them. They were both wonderful to work with, quick to get back with me and answer any of my questions. Ashley did a fantastic job as my lawyer. My case went to trial, she asked all the right questions, and finally my disability was approved. It was a long process, but I could have never got it done without Rainwater, Holt, & Sexton. If you need help with your disability, I highly recommend that you give them a call.

reviews.text: On April 25th 2024 I was riding my motorcycle into work and was merged into by a uhaul at around 35 mph and in an instant I was thrown from my bike, on the ground evading oncoming traffic, busted up confused and bloody. I ended up in pretty bad shape covered in cuts scrapes and road rash with a few cracked bones and stitches on my forehead above my right eyebrow where I had initially landed and the debt I found myself in after the fact seemed to be just as bad. I spoke with attorney after attorney and lawfirm after lawfirm whom were sympathetic yet unwilling to help and that is when Mr. Joe Hoke and Ms. Brittni Sabatini had reached out to me. To put it bluntly these to were simply amazing from the jump not only were they prepared to represent and fight for me but they also gave me all kinds of information on my situation that no one else seemed to care to do and that was even before I agreed to have them represent me. They had estimated the case would take roughly a year from start to finish and had things to a close months before that. Both Joe and Brittni had me awe struck from the word "go" being extremely honest, informative, dedicated, timely and caring. These two not only did everything they could to properly represent me and fight on my behalf but also doubled the settlement amount other lawfirms barely had time to even quote. In my situation when I found myself down struggling and broken in many different ways Joe Hoke and Brittni Sabatini extended an understanding and caring hand with communication guidance and on point timely information to lift me up and get me back on my feet. They turned what had seemed to be hopeless into the absolute best of a bad situation. With Joe and Brittni's information and guidance we were able to get all the medical bills, damages, lost wages and lost hope back where they needed to be. I can not express enough just  how grateful and appreciative I am to and for these two for everything they have done on my behalf and helping me in my time of need especially when no other lawfirms could see "the benefit of it". Not only would I request these two again in a heartbeat if found in a similar situation but I strongly, highly, firmly, and confidently recommend them to anyone else in similar circumstances (and will). A 5 star review just does not seem like enough to fully show my appreciation and gratitude for everything these two have gone above and beyond to do for me not to mention the caring, timely,  informative, respectful, and professional way they carried themselves throughout this endeavor. At the very least I would like to say: to Mr. Joe Hoke,  and to Ms. Brittni Sabatini, Thank you! Thank you so very much for everything you have done and didn't have to do but did anyway, going that extra mile on my behalf. Joe and Brittni you are truly a godsend, I have nothing but the utmost appreciation and respect for the both of you. We need more people and representatives that care and carry themselves the way you two continue to do.
reviews.ownerResponse: Wow! Thank you for the glowing review of our team, Thomas. Thank you for going with Rainwater, Holt & Sexton and letting us represent your case!

reviews.text: I was extremely glad that Sean Keith agreed to take my sister’s case. He came highly recommended by someone who knows the best attorneys in Northwest Arkansas. The 1st visit was free to see how the case looked on if it was a no/go or not... I love what Kat had to offer. I then met Steven and he had me when we set down to look at my case! reviews.text:
I cannot speak highly enough of The Law Group of Northwest Arkansas PLLC. From the very first interaction, it was clear that this firm operates at an exceptionally high professional standard, combining legal expertise with genuine client care in a way that is both rare and deeply reassuring.

In particular, Gabbi deserves special recognition. She was an absolute standout throughout the entire process. Her communication was clear, timely, and thoughtful, and she consistently demonstrated a deep understanding not only of the legal issues at hand, but also of the human element involved. Gabbi took the time to listen carefully, explain complex matters in an accessible and respectful manner, and ensure that I felt informed and confident at every stage. Her attention to detail and proactive approach made a potentially stressful situation feel organized and manageable.

The firm as a whole reflects a culture of professionalism, integrity, and excellence. Every interaction felt purposeful and client-centered, from initial consultations to follow-up communication. The attorneys and staff alike exhibited a strong command of the law while maintaining a level of approachability and empathy that immediately sets this firm apart. It was evident that my case was treated with seriousness, diligence, and respect—not as a transaction, but as a responsibility.

What truly distinguishes The Law Group of Northwest Arkansas PLLC is their ability to balance precision and strategy with compassion and transparency. I always felt that my best interests were the priority, and that no question or concern was too small to address. This level of care builds trust, and trust is invaluable when navigating legal matters.

If you are seeking a law firm that exemplifies professionalism, competence, and genuine dedication to its clients, I would recommend The Law Group of Northwest Arkansas PLLC without hesitation. And if you have the opportunity to work with Gabbi, you can be confident that you are in exceptionally capable hands.

reviews.text: I had a very disappointing experience with this law firm.  I was released due to a conflict of interest (no fault of my own) at a critical point in my case, which caused significant stress and disruption.  I was also billed after I was no longer a client all while trying to secure new representation and paying for a new attorney.   Clients retain a lawyer because they lack legal expertise.  In my opinion, if a client is released due to a conflict of interest they should be notified in writing about any potential ongoing billing at the attorney's discretion. Based on my experience, I would not recommend this firm.
reviews.ownerResponse:
TLGNWA takes concerns about billing and ethics seriously, and we categorically disagree with the characterization presented here.

Our firm follows written engagement agreements with all clients, conducts internal review of all invoices, and adheres strictly to our professional and ethical obligations. When withdrawal from representation is required, for any reason, attorneys are obligated to take certain steps to protect client interests, and such work is billable and consistent with standard legal practice.

While we regret this reviewer’s dissatisfaction, we stand by our practices and remain committed to transparency and ethical representation.

reviews.text:
This firm’s billing practices are unethical.

My attorney continued charging me after telling me he was withdrawing from my case — including billing me for preparing and filing his own motion to withdraw. He also billed me for preparing interrogatory responses which he did not actually answer, he merely copied and pasted objections into a document. On top of that, a conflict of interest arose months earlier, yet it was ignored until much later, during which time I was billed thousands of dollars for work that never should have happened.

Now, instead of acknowledging these issues, the firm is threatening to send me to collections for refusing to pay for the legal work done related to their withdrawal from my case. I have paid all monies owed to them for the work done before the conflict of interest arose.

I trusted this firm to act in my best interest. Instead, I was overbilled, kept in the dark about a conflict, and now I’m being pressured to pay for their own exit from representation.

If you’re considering hiring this firm, think twice. You might want to ask very specific questions about:

How they handle conflicts of interest
Whether they bill for withdrawing
And what happens if you dispute charges
reviews.ownerResponse:
TLGNWA takes concerns about billing and ethics seriously, and we categorically disagree with the characterization presented here.

While we regret this reviewer’s dissatisfaction, we stand by our practices and remain committed to transparency and ethical representation.

reviews.text: I have used this firm for years, because I felt like Kristy truly had my best interest in mind in all our dealings.  A recent interaction dramatically changed my mind.  I engaged the firm to write a Terms and Conditions Document as well as a Privacy Policy for an app I was developing.  The app developer I was using told me that they had used a local attorney, and similar policies cost upwards of $2500-$3500 to get produced.  I told them, I had an attorney that I trusted.  I engaged Kristy for the project.  A couple weeks later, Kristy informed me that the "research was taking longer" than she would have thought and wanted to give me an update.  That sounded costly....So, I asked how much research she was anticipating.  She responded with 40-50 hours of research and another 10-15 hours to write the document.  WHAT??????  For a terms and conditions policy that I can go to Legal Zoom and get for a few hundred dollars????  I immediately asked her to stop research.  I told her I needed to get on the same page with the developers and that I would get back with her about the project.  She stopped researching, but continued writing the document.  About 2 weeks later, she delivered a document that she said was only valid in 15 out of 50 states because she hadn't researched them.  At the time, my Father in law was in hospice.  When I received the document, I told her I would review it after his funeral, etc.  I was extremely angry, but didn't want to address the fact that she had continued writing a document after I told her to stop and then delivered a document that is completely useless for 3-5X the cost of what I know another attorney would have done it for.  I waited for the bill so that I could professionally discuss the miscommunication after dealing with our personal family issue.  There were over $6000 of fees for work done prior to me asking her to stop.  And there was another $3630 of fees after I asked her to stop.  At this point, I addressed the miscommunication, expressed my frustration about there not being any communication on the front end about how much research it was going to take, and I asked if we could negotiate the bill because of the miscommunication.  Kristy's response was 100% lawyer speak.  Rather than taking responsibility for her portion of the miscommunication, she only defends her actions.  She explains why it was necessary.  Then lawyer speak about "you said stop research. not stop writing."  The actions are deplorable.  Anyone with a brain would understand that when I say, "Stop the research", my intent is to halt the project.  It is absolutely beyond me how anyone could take those words and then continue to do $3600 worth of legal work.  I take responsibility for my portion of the miscommunication.  That's why I ask if we could talk about the bill.  Rather than acknowledging that she made a mistake, she would rather throw away a decade long relationship over $3600.  In addition, clearly, she did not have the knowledge to write the document I needed without doing 40-50 hours of research.  That's not normal.  I've talked to other legal professionals.  It's not normal.  Legally, you're right Kristy.  I owe you the money.  The check is in the mail.  Humanely, your actions are deplorable.  If you take this line with a client that has been loyal to you for nearly a decade, how are you going to treat others?  I lost all respect for you over this.  I understand a difference of opinions.  I understand a miscommunication.  I do not understand your unwillingness to acknowledge your mistakes and do what's in the best interest of a long time client.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Landreth:
TLGNWA would like to thank you for being a long-term client and the trust you have placed in us over the years. TLGNWA is not, nor do we try to be, competitors with online DIY legal services such as LegalZoom. Rather, TLGNWA focuses on providing tailored services to clients based on the needs of that individual client, which often requires extensive research and writing. We are sorry that our work did not meet your expectations, and we wish you the best in the future.

Let me start by saying "How AMAZING Ellen is as a person and as a Lawyer". She made this experience a less stressful one despite the difficulty of the situation. I was told for the last 18 years that there was no way I would be a US Citizen due to some issues in the past. I have tried multiple "so called 5 stars lawyers" that cost an arm and a leg...just to find out they wanted more money.
A friend of mine referred me to Ellen. He had a bad situation regarding his Green Card, and his case was " A No Win" according to his "New York City Lawyer".
I called Ellen's Office, and set up an appointment on the phone. Ellen was honest, and she did not discuss the money part of it until she answered all the questions, and she was honest about all the facts and procedures. When she mentioned the cost, I was so surprised. She was the lowest rate in all of the other lawyers I had spoken to, yet made more "Sense" than all. I felt very assured after talking with her.
I signed the contract, and she started working on my case right the way. She did not submit my application until she made sure all was good to go. We kept in touch via email and phone. She is very quick to reply, and is very patient.  Six months later, I had my interview in the Fort Smith Office, and she was there without asking for additional cost. I became a US Citizen because of her effort and coaching.
The immigration officers seemed to like Ellen a lot which is a plus. This is my honest review of Ellen and her staff at the Northwest Immigration Law. If anyone needs to win their case, they don't need to go to big cities to find a good lawyer. Ellen is the best at her field, honest, and very affordable.

I now have my Green Card and will recommend this firm to anyone who is looking for quality guidance for their immigration case. Thank you for your help and the care you put into handling my visa/residency.
This is a good place, excellent lawyers, good service.
Richard is simply the best. He's helped us through a variety of legal needs and is informed and sensible!

Richard has done a few real estate closings for my wife and I, and drafted our estate plan/trust.  We have been very happy with his services, and never hesitate to refer clients to him.  In fact, I just referred a client to him, so I thought I'd leave him a well earned positive review and recommendation.
Mr. Miller was very professional  and patient with us.
Excellent help and advice from this law office.
As always excellent! ! Highly recommend! !
Settled my mom's estate and helped me through the process. I highly recommend!
Munawar Ali Burdi
Adell is kind and caring and will do everything in her power to fight for her clients. I am so appreciative of her and her work.
This place is very empathetic about your situation

Melissa McManus did absolutely NOTHING for us except constantly have her hand out wanting more money and more money! I thought when you pay an attorney that they are supposed to help you, not this lady.  After 8 months of her doing absolutely nothing except taking money then she will just up and quit and leave you hangin. Then you're back to square one looking for an attorney to handle your case! Her professional manners are far from professional. Giving 1 star is too much, she doesn't even deserve a full star!!

UPDATE… June 2022

Best Lawyer!!! María his sectetary is such a beautiful person!

Update!! June/2022
Once again I would like to make a review about the McManus Law  Firm… March 30th was a very sad night for me and as a result of that Tornado I cannot go back to being the same person I was. I feel symptoms of PTSD.
But I have to point out that George, Melissa and their staff were angels in my time of despair and sorrow.  George was so generous with me that tears still come out of my eyes. In addition to helping me financially along with his wife and his staff.  He also offered me  shelter and food.  Sometimes we think that lawyers are only in charge of handling cases in court... well not McManus Law Firm.
I have never seen or heard something like this before.  If you are looking for an attorney who is totally into your problem, don't hesitate to hire George or Melissa.  The rest of my life will not be enough to thank them for such a beautiful gesture.  They will be in my prayers forever…🙏🏽
I recommend them 100%
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words and we love Maria too!!!

reviews.text: Truly recommend Melissa at Mcnanus Law, they truly care and take care of you. Her staff is amazing and responsive! They took care of my needs and never had any issues! Thank you Jennifer for being so sweet and attentive and getting me well taken care of!

I’m so grateful with the McManus Family. I have been a customer for a few years now. My past relationship has tried getting me in trouble with the law, some charges could of done a negative impact for my future but George took my case and made sure that didn’t happen. Melissa has also done a great job, she has helped me with my visitation rights for my child. I highly recommend both George and Melissa to fight for your case!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Mario and it has been an honor to get to help you navigate through some difficult times in your life.

I would say that I initially do not recognize the user name on this review so I am a bit unarmed to respond, but in all aspects of life it is important to respond. As an attorney I know that at times our clients don’t get everything they want and that is the tough part of the job.  We at the McManus Law Firm will continue to do the best we can for our clients.  This will never be perfect, but the effort will be there.  May God bless you and your family and keep you safe in these difficult times.

reviews.text: McManus has passion in what he does. He went above and beyond to help in my brother's case. Whatever situation you or a family member faces, I guarantee you this man will go above and beyond to do what needs to be done.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you very much for your kind words.

reviews.text: I've been working with the McManus team since 2006 and they are the best, they have really worked hard to help with any of my legal matters and will tell me honestly what needs to happen every step of the way!

I stepped into Mrs. McManus' office on a Wednesday afternoon concerning custody of my son. The following day, at eleven o'clock in the morning, I was picking him up from daycare for a trip to the park. Not enough words available to express my gratitude.

Alex Miller is the go-to estate and tax attorney for my senior adult clients.  I am confident that he will go the extra mile to make their experience easier and understandable.  I highly recommend him to work with baby boomers and elderly facing tougher decisions for their future.

RMP was a huge help to our family in dealing with Elder Law planning for long term care for a close family member.  It was a huge relief to have experts helping guide us through a very complicated and difficult time.

Jenae Randall represented me in a custody case of mine in 2021, she was professional, informational, and the communication was prompt. She worked wonders on this case. Fast forward a few more years and I found myself in need of her expertise again. In August of 2024 I found myself in need of a lawyer and Jenae represented me on another case and did not disappoint for a second time. Another wonderful experience and she went above and beyond for me. She is knowledgeable and helpful but one of my favorite things is she does not sugar coat anything and is straight forward with what to expect. I HIGHLY recommend Randall Law firm, your peace is worth every penny and to have Jenae and Katy on your side makes you feel less alone in a stressful situation, 10/10 recommend!
Excellent lawyer who is very understanding, and will make sure your case has a fair outcome.

I can't be more thankful for Jenae's help and support.  I reached out feeling hopeless, and Jenae was responsive and quick to jump into action.  I hired her in a criminal case against my son in which I did not expect her to win.  The odds were against him. I just wanted someone to stand by my son so he would know that he was not alone. Jenae not only stood by him, but succeeded in getting the charges dropped.  She is affordable, and passionate about fighting for her client.  Thanks so much Jenae!

It's difficult to even find a starting place to describe Jenae and her law firm.

Words such as Professional, Passionate and Driven all fall short of describing her both as a person and professional.

She and Kate went above and beyond to meet our needs. What initially started as a simple client and attorney relationship blossomed into so much more. Their level of compassion made our difficult journey so comforting.

We will forever remember how they made us feel like family.

Janae was appointed ad litem for our case and started out quite well and seemed to go over evidence and fight for the child really well. This case drug on for a year and a half. The week before court she started acting differently and became very unprofessional including cursing during meetings, then completely flipped on her original decisions from the months prior. She allowed her own personal feelings to get in the way of her professional opinions and in the end the judge didn't agree with her decisions. Not to mention the outrageous amount she charges for what seemed like very sub par work.
Jenae is a dedicated professional and I am tremendously impressed by her work!
Janae was appointed ad litem in our child custody case. She did a great job navigating the lies and deception...and was able to find the truth! I highly recommend her in any legal matter.

Unprofessional, overpriced, should not work with kids or family cases involving Abuse, unfairly biased, constantly late, poor feedback & communication skills, an absolute nightmare for our family's case

If I could leave zero stars I would. Worst attorney I have ever dealt with. Do NOT use her as an ad litem in your case. Absolutely stear clear and get someone else if at all possible. She did little to NOTHING in regards to my daughter, was EXTREMELY biased from the beginning, and did NOT follow up on a single thing. Never called and talked to teachers, counselors, people regularly in the life of the minor child, and only met my child twice. Thankfully the judge was able to see right through her and the poor judgement she has and her recommendation was NOT used. Mothers: DO NOT USE!!!!!
Was not pleased with this attorney at all. She knows why. Not gonna elaborate because that's not the kind of person i am. Glad things went the way they did and not in favor of her recommendation.
Jenae is hands down the best attorney I've worked with,so helpful very very smart and all around an amazing person,so satisfied for everything she did for me:) ,thank you so much Jenae

I highly recommend Jenae for any legal needs you may have. From day one, she has been very thorough with her work, easy to get ahold of and talk to, and made the whole process affordable. I couldn't have felt better represented in the court room, and helped me win exactly what I wanted.
Great. Awesome attorney!
Hard working, will fight for you despite how the odds may seem. Wouldn't put my trust in any other law firm to take care of needs.

Jenae was able to fully satisfy my case beyond measures. She went above and beyond to do everything she possibly could to fight for me. I am grateful for her and will DEFINITELY be going to her for any further legal advice. Thank you again for all your hard work!!
Do not use this person for ANY reason. She'll tell you she can do whatever you need then take your money and NEVER call you back. Worthless.
Jenae and her team are caring, listen to your concerns and help you.

Jenae has helped our family for roughly 5 years now. I couldn't imagine going through everything without her! She is amazing, thorough, honest and always responsive! Do not think twice about contacting her!

Jenae is a hardworking, hard fighting, and compassionate attorney. She always made herself available to answer questions and to listen. I hope to never have to hire an attorney again, but if I do it'll be Jenae.

Ms. Jenae is very professional, helpful, and knowledgeable. She helped me with my case. She was very responsive and I felt very well represented. She was available for all of my questions. Very personable which made a stressful situation very light. I would go to her for any and all my legal necessities.
Jenae guided me through a difficult case and was fantastic. She worked to keep costs down while fighting hard for us. I'm happy and impressed with every aspect of her work, and I strongly recommend.
Great!
Couldn't be any happier with Ms. Randall's work and determination. 👏🏻👍🏻
Very friendly and professional!

Randall Law Firm is top notch place if you're looking to hire a lawyer to take care of you. I have worked this Mrs. Randall off and on for the past three years and I have always received nothing but excellent services. I highly recommend her for any legal and personal cases
I've turned a lot of folks on to Mr. Sterling and everyone of them have gotten their disability
Thank yout
Great place and a wonderful law office.
Probably one of the best disability lawyers in Arkansas

Mr. Sterling helped me with my SS Disability.  My husband was a psychiatrist. When he was practicing he only referred our patients that required disability to Brent Sterling.  I still  refer people to him in my ministry to others.  He has always outstandingly  performed in his legal abilities.  I highly recommend him without reservation.
Best lawyer in town
Best Laywer for SSDI that I know. Because of him I won my appeal

Refuses to get back too you when you call him. Wont do his job at all. Having trouble even getting him to contact any of the companies. Got in a wreck and hired him and I've almost lost the gap insurance on my car because he didnt take care of it like he is suppose to.
He is very good at what he does

Brent was extremely knowledgeable through out my disability case.  He even helped me with my review after 2 years. I appreciate all he has done for me not to mention at least 4 of his other clients I know personally that he has helped and had same positive results as mine if not even better!! Thanks so much to Brent and his whole office for everything I was helped with!! 😀 #satisfiedcustomer
Straight shooter.
Excellent
Best group in town.  I'm a huge fan of Terry Harper!

Please be aware, particularly ladies, W.H. Taylor will not fight for you. My sister lives on a pre-school teacher salary and she had to pay her lying, cheating, abusive ex $225,000 to stay in their house. By the way, this is a house that our dad built and paid for and her ex had no part in paying for, including taxes. She gets no child support and her ex was not held accountable for abandoning 2 of their 4 adopted children. But W.H. refused to fight. He even made the statement "abandoning a child is not illegal..." He will refuse to fight for you but he will not be late sending a bill.

Today I went to Taylor Law Firm and had an appointment with Chris Housan. I had seen him previously, but this case was a lot more difficult and he listened intently to what the problems were ask, what would make me happy to get it resolved turned around pick up the phone spoke with the person and we got both of them put away. They were happy and I certainly was happy. I would highly recommend Chris with Taylor Law Firm and I will certainly use him again if I have the need to I will also refer anybody that needs an attorney to go see Chris

Like others have said on Google reviews and other law websites. Attorney Matt Benson kept saying he would get back with you only to not do so. Worst experience ever. To add insult $1000 was charged for doing nothing and arguably made things worse. I felt helpless and left in the dark, I would not recommend anyone to hire him unless it was the opposition.

Matt Benson is the most inattentive attorney I’ve ever known. He was recommended to me by a friend who had a friend who went to law school with him, and that friend regrets the recommendation. I hired him to hold my ex in contempt for blatantly violating our divorce decree, which he agreed was valid. Meanwhile my ex set me up to hold me in contempt for not listing my house by the date the decree stated. The house was vacant for over three months and I requested to sell it then, but she wouldn’t unless I paid to haul off trash and clean the place, which was her responsibility per the decree, so I declined. The house was abandoned and needed a mere $4K in repairs before it went on the market. He claims he asked for the agreement with the opposition, yet they never responded? But because I was waiting for that, Matt let the time expire and they filed to hold me in contempt for not listing it with the damages on the date agreed upon. His response to their complaint was so elementary and basic. There was a 2 week period where he literally told me every day that he was going to call me yet never did. Then, he finally responded to an email and addressed me as someone else’s name. For $300/hr you get better service than that! The courts asked him for over three weeks to set a court date and he ignore them. Then, after I fired him, he set a date that caused me to cancel a vacation I had planned for 6 months and he wasn’t event going to be there. He then proceeded to charge me over $2K to file the weakest response I mentioned above without ever doing any lawyering. If you choose him, you’re doomed. Probably why this lawn firm didn’t even have him listed as an attorney when I hired him. Shameful to say the least.

Terrible experience with Matt Benson. Always promises things and never delivers. Been trying to get contempt charges drawn up for at least 12 months and he takes my money but doesn't do anything then needs more money. I had mediation and he left in the middle of the mediation. Chris came in and was helpful but still Chris didn't know anything about the case. I will say Sol Kim while he was at Taylor Law Partners was the best attorney I have personally ever been around. Unfortunately he is no longer with the firm. I can't even get ahold of Matt to fire him.

Sol Kim was appointed as my children’s ad litem.  He recommended joint custody to the court  despite loads of evidence regarding an unsafe situation. He was not kind to communicate with and seems to not have any regard for children’s welfare.   A year later, the person he gave joint custody to is unemployed, driving drunk with my children and has given up being a parent at all saying they don’t have the mental health or means to parent.  Children are vulnerable and deserve better.

I'd hired Chris for a messy custody issue. Everything started out great, but communication was an issue not long after our initial meeting. Ended up facing contempt because of his advice. Basically went from I can help you to nope nothing we can do. I'd run knowing them what I know now.
Everyone here is so amazing and helpful.

We called in due to uncertainty in knowing how to proceed on an insurance issue. Blake attentively listened to our concern and provided options for us in a plan of action. He was through, knowledgeable, showed patience, and answered all our questions that we had.

Chris Hussein is a true professional who goes above and beyond for his clients. I have had the pleasure of working with Chris and can tell you first hand that he is an excellent attorney with deep knowledge of the law and courtroom skills to back it up. If you are in need of an attorney in Northwest Arkansas - Chris Hussein is who you need to call.

Well, first off I served this great nation under Delta Co 3rd AABN MCAGCC Cpl USMC and when I talked to Scott Smith he assured me that I would be taken care of 100%. We got Chris Hussein and in the beginning he was great. After a big fubar on my wife’s ex side and his attorney we were given our 2 boys back. After that I called Scott twice and left messages for him to call me…..Ghosted, no return call. We emailed Chris several times and just got the run around. After finally getting fed up with no action, we just asked to close up everything and get a refund if we had one coming. Instead of explaining anything, asking what he could have done better…..He instructed the secretary to refund us. We simply wanted to go to mediation with the ex and he couldn’t even make that happen. Ashamed how they treat clients, veterans and from one Marine to another Scott…….SFMF I’d give your firm a 1/2 star if I could.

Chris Hussein represented me with the utmost respect, care and diligence. After interviewing several lawyers, I easily chose him over the others due to his ability to truly listen and validate my experience while developing a strategy that worked best for me. He and his team communicated efficiently and effectively making me feel secure and supported throughout my case.
I greatly value the service and care I received from Chris and the Taylor Law Partners firm and will continue to consult them in any legal matters I may have!
Chris Hussein and Eva Barrera were so helpful guiding me through my divorce.  I highly recommend them not only for their professionalism but also because of their kindness.
Sol Kim is a very professional lawyer, ethical with his clients, very responsible.

I can't say enough good things about this firm. I use them for both my business and personal matters.

Eun Sol Kim has been a blessing in my life. He guided me through a nasty divorce case. If it wasn't for him I would have most likely been unjustly left for broke and on the streets. He's also helped me write up my prenup, started an immigration case, and helped with my child custody case. He is patient, caring, determined, and very knowledgeable in the practice areas he has helped my with.

On the business side of things I have worked with Rick Woods. To sum it up, he is a beast. He practices in many areas and in my case it is business and commercial litigation, and construction law. He is scary aggressive. It's best to have him on your side and not against you. Let him handle your bad debt cases so you can keep running your business smoothly and efficiently and keep making money.

These attorneys value your time and money. I trust them with my checkbook. You get a feeling like they're big brother that has your back when working with these guys. Without them you might was well represent yourself, which only a fool does. I will continue to use this firm every time I need legal representation.

Sol Kim, our immigration lawyer, exceeded our expectations in every way. His guidance throughout my wife's residency process was invaluable. His deep understanding of immigration law, combined with his approachable demeanor, made us feel at ease. He would address all of our concerns, ensuring we were well-informed every step of the way.
His expertise made the process seamless, allowing us to successfully obtain my wife's residency in under 4 months. We're incredibly grateful for Sol's dedication and highly recommend his services to anyone in need of assistance with the law.

I can't express enough how grateful I am for the outstanding support I received from Sol Kim with my immigration process. His expertise and dedication were instrumental in ensuring the success of my case. From the initial consultation to the final resolution, he guided me with utmost professionalism, addressing all my concerns and keeping me well-informed throughout the process. I 100% recommend his services to anyone in need of legal assistance.
Sol Kim, a really  good family law, and Immigration attorney always trying to find the best way to help his clients  and very efficient.
Great group to work with. Very experienced and helpful.
Very knowledgeable and helpful firm, great experience!

Sol helped my wife and I with her residency and made our process very easy and straight forward, he was able to answer all of our questions and gave us honest expectations which we really appreciated, I would highly recommend using his expertise.
Great lawyer. Sol helped me navigate through a lot of tough issues and obtained positive outcome for me. 100% recommend.

Sol Kim was our immigration attorney and one of the best attorneys out there. He was thorough with all the steps, guided us on everything and communicated very well with my husband and I. He's been my attorney since 2017 and helped me a lot through this process. Very thankful for Sol! 100% recommend!

Sol Kim refused to let me in with my wife after his secretary said "that would be weird" when I asked her if he had to meet her alone. Sol Kim doesn't seem to me to put effort into helping a child even if you put all the numbers and pictures and information in his face.

Chris Hussein was my attorney for my custody case, he was EXTREMLY helpful, knowledgeable and patient with me. I will recommend Chris to anyone I talk to. If I ever need an attorney again I will absolutely be calling Chris!

I used Chris Hussein for my divorce and custody case. He was straight forward and did an amazing job. He responded quickly and always keep me up to date on my case. I would recommend him and Taylor Law Partners to anyone needing an attorney!
The best in NWA!

Definitely recommend Scott. Wow! He was expeditious and on point. Utilized him for mediation and was very impressed with ability to resolve our disagreements with professionalism and efficiency. Thank you sir. You are the man.

Sol Kim with Taylor Law far exceeded my expectations as an attorney. He was always non-judgmental, very communicative, and straight to the point with what was needed from me. I felt very confident having him represent me and feel he fought for my best interest. Taylor Law Partners as a firm was extremely impressive- everyone was very professional, respectful, and made every part of the process feel seamless. Thank you!

The entire process I had with Taylor Law Partners was amazing. They kept me up to date with everything I needed to settle my case. Chris Hussein was a great help and helped me keep my record clean. Couldn’t recommend a better Law Office!
Chris Hussein shouldered the legal burden of my divorce and took care of everything. I would recommend Taylor Law Partners to anyone in need.

Andrew Myers is an awesome attorney I was very satisfied with the work he did for our case he communicated very well and explains each situation with detail and answers all our questions and kept us updated on everything highly recommend
Excellent service. Sol Kim is kind and efficient in his work.

Sol Kim demonstrated an unconscious bias throughout my entire case that makes him very dangerous for children as a guardian ad-litem.   Consistently showed a flippant and arrogant attitude.   He is masterful at moving the goal post of discussion so he did not have to acknowledge criticisms of his words or decisions.   My teenager had him figured out in the beginning and did not trust him at all.
Amazing lawyers!  Nobody in the legal community will tell you different.

We used Chris Hussein for a custody battle. We had a tough situation and not a lot of hope in the beginning. But he was straight forward, very helpful, always answered my phone calls or messages, and knows the law. He was a blessing and gave my family hope. I will use him again if i ever have to lawyer up for my family. 10 out of 10 recommend him if you are going through a custody battle and need someone who will advocate and work hard for you family. Worth every penny. My family thanks you.

I had a messed up case involving my now Ex-wive and her attorney getting before a judge without serving me or advising me of the court date. They got a very one sided judgement against me where the court ordered me to pay her a huge sum of cash.
Drew Myers took my case and from that moment on I knew things would be alright. Drew was responsive and answered all my questions in a timely manner and in plain english.
Drew had the court overturn the original divorce, filed a new divorce, and negotiated an very reasonable & fair settelment with her and her attorney.
I would recommend Drew to anyone needing a good family law attorney.

Tyler Benson with Hall Estill recently represented me in a custody contempt case against my ex-husband. Throughout the entire process Tyler and his team were communicative, professional and extremely empathetic. Tyler coordinated with the opposing party's attorney and the ad litem in my case, advising me of my available options based on this discourse and the circumstances that were given. Me and my ex were able to come to an agreement to present the judge before the final hearing that I feel was fair to all parties, thanks in no small way due to Tyler's diligence and attention to detail in my case. Thank you Tyler, Molly and everyone at Hall Estill for being in my corner!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Autumn, we are lucky to have Tyler at Hall Estill.

reviews.text: Doug Gramling is an experienced, dedicated and trustworthy attorney. I've known him for more than 30 years. Impeccable integrity.

I contacted several attorneys with regard to my case; 1 had a conflict of interest; 3 did not practice in Carroll County; one stated that he was not interested in anything that might drag on for years; 1 said $2K retainer/$200 per hour; 2 just said that they were not interested. Mr. Douglas Gramling was kind enough and call me back and we talked, he listened and suggested that I send him the information I had and he would look it over and call me back. It was nice to have someone listen.

The law firm was clean and nicely kept up. However, the secretary was very casual. I might have caught the office on casual Friday or something. However, I expect when I walk into a law firm that everyone is dressed up. It is a highly professional  environment. As for their services. I inquired about some things and I never heard a response. They said they would get back to me and never did. I called thinking they just got busy and forgot. Unfortunately, even after calling and asking further they said the same as before. "They would get back to me." Once again they did not. So if you're  looking for a valid and quick response I would look elsewhere.

Trey prepared my will as well as a living trust. He helped me do things efficiently to avoid probate and make things easier for my beneficiaries. I am very impressed! He explained every thoroughly, and he was so nice! He answered all my questions and worked hard achieve all my goals. I never felt unsure or intimidated as he was very professional, but he was also very kind. He never made me feel rushed. He prepared a wonderful notebook with a table of contents which contained all my documents! If I could give him a hundred stars, I would. I am very pleased and highly recommend Trey Robbins! His assistant, Mona, is also just superb. Thank you so much, Trey!
Trey knew just what I needed to get my docs up to date and accomplished it in a very timely manner. Short wait time to see him. Would recommend. Thanks!
Friendly, professional and efficient.  We will use Trey in the future and would recommend him to friends and family.

Trey is an excellent bankruptcy attorney, he has over 20 years of experience . Extremely knowledgeable, responsive, and professional throughout the entire process. He truly made a stressful situation much easier to handle and was always available to answer my questions. He was very well prepared for our 341 hearing and had all documents submitted to the trustee. I couldn’t have asked for better representation and would absolutely recommend his services to anyone who is needing representation for bankruptcy.

Trey and staff are very knowledgeable in the complexities of estate planning.  Their professionalism simplified everything for us and made the whole process much less intimidating than we imagined, much to our delight.  We feel very confident that our wishes for our heirs are in capable hands, and that peace of mind is a true blessing.  Thank you Trey!!

Trey and team did a great job of providing education on the estate planning process, options, and solutions. They helped us decide on the best solution after they learned about our family situation, priorities, and concerns. The estate planning solution they implemented was done quickly and at a reasonable cost. I highly recommend you contact Trey Robbins for assistance with your estate planning needs!

We recently had a Revocable Trust completed by Trey Robbins.  He was so kind and thorough during the entire process.  We appreciate how he accommodated us with a time frame to meet our needs. We recommend Trey Robbins for any estate planning and feel safe in knowing that we have been given the best advice for what we needed.

All staff at this Law Firm were wonderful. They are a kind and caring office. They made dealing with my mother's estate through probate easier on me. It was a pleasure having them work for me in this matter.
I would recommend Trey to anyone looking for a good attorney. He and Mona are top notch!
Great service

In utilizing multiple Attorney's through the years, Mr. Tennant and Mr. Robbins have separated themselves in professionalism and personal attentiveness.  We are still utilizing their services in setting up other family members estate planning and recommend them above all others.
We would like to thank you for taking such good care of us and our families!

We have only positive feedback for this law firm. They provided the legal services needed in a kind, courteous and efficient manner. They are trustworthy and knowledgeable and we highly recommend them.

Excellence in action.  Estate planning at its finest.  Explained in detail in a manner that was easily understood.  Executed exactly as explained.  A very professional team that knows the law with a ton of experience in estate planning.  Highly recommended.  Fair and fast.  Thank you Trey for your professionalism.
Competence, straightforwardness, professionalism and friendly. This is what were looking for. We would highly recommend this law firm to anyone searching for great legal assistance.
Excellent experience with estate planning. Highly recommend.

We absolutely love Trey Robbins & Steve Tennant.  We have worked with both lawyers and they are very knowledgeable and go above and beyond to help you with whatever you need.  Not only are they great, but their office staff is as well.  Mona is always super friendly and gets you scheduled in as quickly as possible.  We have used them for Estate Planning, Business Transactions, & Real Estate purchases.  These guys can help you with just about anything. Highly recommend them both!

Trey is an amazing estate lawyer. He knows his stuff. We thought that we had all of our estate planning taking care of because we have had a will for many years. After meeting with Trey, we found out that what you don't know can hurt you. We set up a Trust with Trey and now we have confidence that our family will be taken care of.
Trey was recommended by my finanical advisor to help set up a trust and other documents.  From first meeting to signing documents was about 6 weeks..
We moved here late last year and Trey and his team helped us set up all our legal details for our business!  So kind and goes out of their way to help.   I'm so thankful for them!!!

When the unexpected happened to our family, Odom Law Firm was there. Bryant and Matt did a great job representing our family. They took care of us at every turn, and worked diligently to the end. Bryant and Matt’s guidance and perseverance carried us through our roller coaster ride. We highly recommend Bryant, Matt, and the Odom Law Firm to anyone in need of help.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, A. Smith, for your kind words. We're glad Bryant and Matt could support your family during this challenging time. Your recommendation means a lot to us. We're here whenever you need assistance.

reviews.text:
Odom Law firm
The attorneys along with the legal documents departments at Odem Law Firm has been efficient in securing the proper information for steering a case to the finish with excellent results.
The reputation of the Odom Law Firm represents best in law practice. My standing would be to recommend there professionalism in any situation needing there services.

Thank You
Mark Rogers
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Mark, for your kind words and recommendation. We strive for excellence in every case and appreciate your trust in our team.

reviews.text: I really appreciate all the help work that Monte and Liz did for me. Very friendly, great communication, diligent & thorough efforts, can’t complain! Would highly recommend, very pleased with my results and would certainly use their services again.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Olof, for your kind words! We're thrilled to hear that Monte and Liz provided you with exceptional service. Your recommendation means a lot to us.

reviews.text:
Gus and the team are super respectful, patient, friendly and communicative. They could help anyone understand the process cause they helped me. I asked so many questions and they were able to help me understand everything. If I or anyone I know is in an accident and needs someone on their side. I will refer them to Odom 100%!

I highly recommend and am thoroughly impressed with Odom Law Firm! After I was rear ended by another car, I could barely turn, raise, or lower my head from the whiplash. Odom Law Firm is very experienced and knowledgeable with car accident injuries and was very thorough with my case. Gus, at Odom Law Firm, was exceptional at being able to explain to me in a way I could easily understand what my options were, as well as her plan for steps in my interest moving forward.  The skillful staff are very warm, caring, and accommodating.  The facilities are very clean and modern, offering coffee, tea, water and cable TV. The appointments are quick and effective, and I've always felt more educated and aware of my options and what to expect after an appointment. In several appointments, I never had to wait more than five minutes before being seen, and they go above and beyond with customer service and communications.  I routinely was given updates by phone, texts, and email messages.  Lastly, and maybe most importantly, my settlement check was actually more than I was expecting from consultations!  They will fight for every penny you are owed!  This is one great law firm, and I highly recommend them!

Ok experience. I thought hiring an attorney I would get maximum results but instead I got minimum results and realized I should have just taken care of it myself. My situation was unique I think and the accident I was involved in was devastating to my life.
I feel like after what I went thru they did not fight for me at all or not enough. They didn't understand my situation or what I went thru at all. I would not use them again.
They did a great job. I highly recommend using the Odem Law Firm.

I was involved in an accident in June 2021.  Soon after, I chose Odom Law Firm/Matt Lindsay to represent me.  From the very beginning he was honest, available when needed, answered all of my questions, etc.  He fought for every penny on 3rd party settlement and I ended up receiving more than what we had originally thought.   I was also represented by Bryant Crooks for Workman's Compensation.  Same result and service.   I'm now working with Conrad for my Disability.  It's been a difficult year since my accident and it has left me disabled due to multiple injuries.  But, one thing I never had to stress over was my representation from Odom Law Firm.  ABSOLUTELY RECOMMEND!
Mr Odom is incredibly helpful!
Mr. Odom was responsive, knowledgeable, wise, and prudent. Add friendly and good-humored, and I could not have been more comfortable, better informed, or better served. Unreservedly recommended.

Do NOT use this guy!. He is the literal worst attorney for criminal defense. He depends on CJA appointments because no real client in their right mind would hire him. Look at his clients who were forced to be represented by him like John Nick and Billy Taylor. Both have 2255 motions pending against him. He is inept and aloof.

When you pull up, it was very confusing where to enter from the parking lot. When I called to find out it was first in the basement and then later it was upstairs . I used Kenneth and then Sammi took over is what I was told. In two words very unprofessional. I consulted with Kenneth and he made me feel very small and uneducated. Cussing all of the time. My personal attorney suggested them but Kenneth complained and talked bad about my other attorney a lot. Then I was switched to Sammi. It was very delightful for the first meeting. She was helpful and explained things to me. But after this she became very rude and talked down to me. She wouldn't respond to my emails and calls for days. She argued with me the I was missing my bank statements but she had already put a check mark on them and have them back to me. When I showed her the pictures. She didn't apologize or anything. And I still had to bring them back in because they didn't scan them in. Over all she was not very helpful with the bankruptcy. Towards the end she didn't even do anything or keep me updated. I had to contact her for updates. Then after the bankruptcy was supposedly finalized it's like she dropped me or something. I got a letter saying it was finalized but it's possible not all items were declared. I emailed and called her two different times with no response still. My van was supposed to be in the bankruptcy but the some reason my van is waiting to be repossessed. This is very unprofessional and I would not recommend them to anyone.

Would never hire Sammi Wilmoth again. She demanded I pay the other parties attorney fees or else she was walking out just minutes before the hearing and to represent myself. She changed her mind last minute and yelled at me in front of others to go to the courtroom after threatening that she was leaving. Which I did, but the judge did not award the other parties attorney fees. And that shocked her. The other party was a drug felon and had little involvement with our child until that year. I presented her with documents at the final hearing to get more time with my child which would have affected the outcome of the final court order and she acted like she had no idea what I was talking about even though the document was signed by another judge.
She did not advocate for my case whatsoever. All the documents I had given her early on to show my cooperation with the temp orders was never considered and ignored because she seemed intimated by the other attorneys involved. Wasted money and time away from my child who still tells me she wants to come home.
Just awful!  I was his client and he couldn’t even get my name right during our case in front of the judge.

Sammi was an absolute life saver!! We live in Texas and my daughter got a ticket in Arkansas on her way to college in Pennsylvania. This was my daughter’s first ticket and being a teenager, she just mailed in the citation with a note stating she wanted to take driver’ ed. (Bless her heart.) With me being in TX, dear daughter in PA, and traffic court in AR, we needed help to get this straightened out. Sammi to the rescue! She was so helpful and kind and quick and helped us get this situation resolved lickety-split!! We are so grateful for her assistance!!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: We are thrilled that you were happy with our services. The feedback you gave is greatly appreciated!

I can honestly assure anyone that if you are not utilizing the legal services of the Osborne Law Firm, Sammi Wilmoth you are truly not getting the best legal representation that you deserve. reviews.text:
George Niblock is an exceptional attorney in every sense of the word. From my personal experience working with him, I found him to be highly knowledgeable, professional, and dedicated to his clients. He possesses a remarkable ability to analyze complex legal situations and provide clear and effective guidance.

One of the things that stood out to me about George is his excellent communication skills. He was always prompt in responding to any questions or concerns I had, and he explained legal concepts in a way that was easy for me to understand. This made me feel at ease throughout the entire legal process.

Not only is George a brilliant attorney, but he also demonstrates genuine care for his clients. He took the time to understand my specific needs and concerns, ensuring that I felt supported and heard. This level of personalized attention made me feel like more than just a case file, and I truly appreciated it.

Overall, I cannot recommend George Niblock enough. His expertise, professionalism, and compassionate approach set him apart as an outstanding attorney. If you're looking for someone who will go above and beyond to provide you with top-notch legal representation, George is the attorney you need by your side.
reviews.ownerResponse: Dana, thank you so much for taking the time to leave us this exceptional feedback! We work hard for our clients so we are so pleased to know that you were pleased with us and the work that we did for you on your case. If you are ever in need again, pleased don't hesitate to reach out, we are here for you.

As someone with significant mental health issues, I would strongly recommend against contacting this firm. Spencer was absolutely cold and borderline rude while dealing with me. Zero patience or care to the point where I literally panicked on the phone and couldn't accurately relay all of the pertinent information. I spent the next three weeks fixating on the cold, careless and frankly unprofessional phone call before receiving a letter basically saying I wasn't worth their time. I hope that neither Spencer nor anyone he may care for ever has to know the Hell I exist in. These people do not care unless you're a sure thing. Spencer doesn't seem to care either way. Beware.

Called to get a consult because I was hit by a big company and the other driver was at fault, figured they would want the case. Got a call a couple days later on 9/8 from Spencer asking me questions about my accident but he kept cutting me off and the interaction as a whole was off putting. Waited days and days to hear from Caitlin to help me get in a rental car because the insurance company was dragging their feet. Never heard from her. Ended up calling Caddell Reynolds and the attorney and his assistant called me back the same day and let me know they would get to work on getting me a rental car since I have a son. I got paperwork to be signed on as a client within one hour of calling them and speaking with the attorney about my accident. It is 9/21 and I still have yet to hear from this office. It is very disappointing considering Caitlin helped my grandmother with her accident and she was always contacted in a timely manner.

reviews.text:
I had an exceptional experience with Payne Law Firm. Mr. Payne, the owner, accepted my case the very day I was released from jail and did so with understanding and professionalism. He provided a reasonable flat-rate fee and worked with my budget to create a manageable payment plan. He also made sure I had flexibility with court appearances, which was extremely helpful given that my job requires me to work in different states.

Robin, my attorney, went above and beyond to ensure I achieved the best possible outcome. Her diligence, expertise, and consistent communication made the entire process far less stressful. The office staff including Becca was equally impressive—always responsive, organized, and quick to get information to me or back to the team when needed. They made everything simple, from scheduling my interlock installation to helping me get my license reinstated both before and after my case was resolved.

Thanks to Rebecca’s hard work and the firm’s professionalism, I was able to navigate a difficult situation with clarity and confidence. I truly appreciate everything they’ve done, and I look forward to speaking with them again in 5–10 years when my case is eligible to be fully erased. Highly recommend Payne Law Firm for anyone needing reliable and dedicated legal representation.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Isaiah, thank you for taking the time to write such a thoughtful and detailed review. We know how disorienting everything can feel right after getting out of jail, and we’re really glad we were able to step in immediately, get a plan in place, and take some of that weight off your shoulders.

Robin is exactly the kind of attorney you want in your corner—thorough, steady, and relentlessly focused on the best possible outcome—and we’ll be sure she and Becca see your kind words. Our goal is always to make the process as smooth and manageable as possible, especially when life and work don’t stop just because a case is pending.

We truly appreciate the trust you placed in our team, and we’re glad you’re walking away from this with clarity and confidence. When the time comes to fully erase this from your record, we’ll be here and happy to help. Have a great new year!

reviews.text: I would not recommend Dustin Duke for legal representation. My partner, Michael, and I have been dealing with a complicated situation involving his mother, Claire, who sold him a house in 2020, leaving it in poor condition and filled with her belongings. Claire had previously removed several items from the property but, upon learning of a citation issued by the city regarding structural issues, she submitted a new list of demands for additional items. We declined to fulfill these demands on that specific date, but we never stated that she could not retrieve her items at a later time. When we declined, she sought legal representation, and her lawyer turned out to be Mr. Duke, who is in a personal relationship with Michael’s sister, Heather. Mr. Duke attempted to conceal their relationship, acting as though he had no ties to the family and seeming confused by the differences between Michael and his siblings. This raised significant concerns about conflicts of interest. Furthermore, Mr. Duke failed to disclose his personal connection to the family, which we believe influenced his handling of the case. Given the sensitive nature of the situation, including threats from Claire and the ongoing stress, we could not rely on Mr. Duke’s objectivity or professionalism. As a result, we advise against utilizing Mr. Duke specifically.
